case_title: GARCIA, OSCAR vs. LEUNG, HING PING et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, HING PING DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-25-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-07-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-27-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-27-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

CORRESPONDENCE FROM JONATHAN NEWMAN (LISTED AS ATTORNEY) OF RECORD, UNDER BAR #047353) MR. NEWMAN IS NOT ATTORNEY OF RECORD. THE BAR NUMBER ENTERED IS INCORRECT ON THE COMPLAINT. ACTUAL ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS IRA FREYDKIS, BAR #113126. (SYSTEM CORRECTED TO SHOW CORRECT ATTORNEY)
COPY OF 11/27/95 OSC MAILED TO CORRECT ATTORNEY.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
